# Website Experience Standard

The website should feel like one institution, not a pile of demos. Each flagship page should state what it is, why it matters, what the visitor can do, what artifact it outputs, what boundary applies, and where to go next.

## Standards

- One native header and one floating Site Command.
- No menu-over-menu stacking.
- No blank or primary Loading states.
- Searchable route discovery from the canonical manifest.
- Public-safe boundary visible near important actions.
- Keyboard-accessible controls and no essential canvas-only content.
